Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Chaka]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Chaka has yellow gemstones in place of his eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Chaka engages in a clash of steel with Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Chaka is a leather man with yellow eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Simon challenges Chaka for breakfast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — Chaka is a character who says Simon can take a Dragon's Fang from the entry hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon performs daily training with Chaka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Chaka is someone who commented on how quickly Andra obtained her Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Chaka does not like Andra and may have influenced Nye to drive her out.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Chaka taught Simon sword forms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Chaka is a fighter who rests in the shade of a fruit tree and duels challengers for meals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Chaka has sword blades instead of hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Chaka raised one bladed arm and scraped it across the other as if sharpening knives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Chaka is a person who was in conversation with a figure in the garden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Chaka has a garden.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Chaka is mentioned as a potential example of a guardian turning into an artificial construct.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
